item.title: 使用ExifTool根據文件夾名稱自動更新照片EXIF資訊
item.description: 修改 EXIF 資訊的腳本，主要用於網路下載的相簿。

item.title: About
item.description: Translate by ChatGPT GPT4o-mini Origin # When I came across various useful pieces of information online, I used to bookmark them. After a while, my bookmarks were almost exploding, so I switched to Word, which was even more painful. Eventually, I used Apple Notes as a temporary solution. Apple Notes has its advantages; it’s unbeatable on Apple devices. However, once you step out of the Apple comfort zone, you’ll find that the features you need are just not available. When my phone was about to break, I realized the Apple ecosystem was too restrictive. After researching other note-taking systems, I discovered Markdown, which is great.
